title: limonium × myosuroides
intro: Limonium × myosuroides, also known as Sea Lavender or Statice, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family, resulting from the cross between Limonium sinuatum and Limonium myosuroides. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Limonium × myosuroides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Limonium × myosuroides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
